summary: Very good audience recording with clear, lively sound; musical performance details are absent
review: Both reviewers award five stars, praising the tape’s high‑quality audience capture and noting it even edges out the well‑known Oade audience recording. No specific comments on the setlist or individual performances are provided.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently high ratings and explicit praise for the audio quality give a strong positive score, but lack of any musical commentary limits certainty.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear audience recording, slightly better than the Oade tape; captures crowd ambience with good fidelity.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific remarks on set structure or performance quality.
